title: selaginella bahiensis subsp. bahiensis
intro: Selaginella bahiensis subsp. bahiensis, also known as "Bahian spikemoss," is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, spiky foliage and ability to thrive in tropical environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Selaginella bahiensis subsp. bahiensis can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
